Limited service offices offer some, but not all of these services. 11 = Full service brick and mortar office; 12 = Full service retail office; 13 = Full service cyber office; 21 = Limited service administrative office; 22 = Limited service military facility; 23 = Limited service drive through or detached facility; 24 = Limited service loan production office; 25 = Limited service consumer credit office; 26 = Limited service contractual office; 27 = Limited service messenger office; 28 = Limited service retail office; 29 = Limited service mobile office; 30 = Limited service trust office

name: FRM_OFF_SERVTYPE_DESC
label: Previous Service Type Description
definition: Service Type Description

name: FRM_OFF_STATE
label: Previous Office State
definition: State in which an institution or one of its branches was previously physically located.

name: FRM_OFF_TRUST
label: Previous Trust Power
definition: Previous trust power status of an institution or one of its branches.

name: FRM_PADDR
label: Previous Physical Street Address
definition: Street address at which the institution or one of its branches was previously physically located.

name: FRM_PADDR2
label: Previous Physical Street Address Line 2
definition: Street address line 2 at which the institution or one of its branches was previously physically located.

name: FRM_PCITY
label: Previous Physical City
definition: City in which an institution's main office or one of its branches was previously physically located. Either the entire name or part of the name of a specific city may be entered to produce an Institution List.

name: FRM_PSTALP
label: Previous State Alpha Code
definition: State abbreviation in which an institution was previously physically located. The FDIC Act defines state as any State of the United States, the District of Columbia, and any territory of the United States, Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, the Virgin Island, and the Northern Mariana Islands.

name: FRM_PZIP5
label: Previous Zip Code
definition: The first three, four, or five digits of the full postal zip code representing the previous physical location of the institution or its branch office.

name: FRM_PZIP5_RAW
label: Previous 5-Digit Zip Code
definition: The 5-digit postal code of an institution or one of its branches previous physical location.

name: FRM_PZIPREST
label: Previous Zip Code Extension
definition: The 4-digit zip code extension of an institution or one of its branches previous physical location.

name: FRM_REGAGENT
label: Previous Chartering Agency
definition: Institution's Previous Chartering Agency - State and Federal, Comptroller of the Currency - Chartering authority for nationally chartered commercial banks and for federally chartered savings associations (The Office of Thrift Supervision (OTS) before 7/21/11) State (includes U.S. Territories) - Chartering authority for institutions that are not chartered by the OCC or OTS

name: FRM_TRUST
label: Previous Trust Power
definition: Previous trust power status of an institution or one of its branches.

name: FX
label: Foreign Exchange Rate Contracts
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Notional amount of all foreign exchange contracts.

name: FXFFC
label: Commitments To Purchase Foreign Currencies & U.S. Dollar Exchange
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Futures and forward foreign exchange contract commitments (gross amounts). The gross amount of contracts committing the reporting institution to purchase foreign currencies and U.S. dollar exchange, whose predominant risk characteristic is foreign exchange risk.

name: FXFFCR
label: Commitments To Purchase Foreign Currencies & U.S. Dollar Exchange
definition: ( YTD, % ) Futures and forward foreign exchange contract commitments (gross amounts). The gross amount of contracts committing the reporting institution to purchase foreign currencies and U.S. dollar exchange, whose predominant risk characteristic is foreign exchange risk.

name: FXNVS
label: Notional Value of Exchange Swaps
definition: ( YTD, $ ) The notional principal amount (in U.S. dollars) of all cross-currency interest rate swaps. The notional amount of a cross-currency interest rate swap is generally the underlying principal amount upon which the exchange is based. A cross-currency interest rate swap is a transaction in which two parties agree to exchange principal amounts of different currencies (usually at the prevailing spot rate) at the inception of an agreement, which lasts for a certain number of years.

name: FXNVSR
label: Notional Value of Exchange Swaps
definition: ( YTD, % ) The notional principal amount (in U.S. dollars) of all cross-currency interest rate swaps. The notional amount of a cross-currency interest rate swap is generally the underlying principal amount upon which the exchange is based. A cross-currency interest rate swap is a transaction in which two parties agree to exchange principal amounts of different currencies (usually at the prevailing spot rate) at the inception of an agreement, which lasts for a certain number of years.

name: FXPOC
label: Purchased Option Contracts
definition: ( YTD, $ ) The contract amount of option contracts where the reporting bank has, for a fee, purchased the right to either purchase or sell an equity instrument, equity index, a commodity, or product not reportable as an interest rate or foreign exchange contract. The predominant risk characteristic is foreign exchange risk. It includes purchased exchange-traded foreign exchange options and purchased OTC foreign exchange options (gross amounts).

name: FXPOCR
label: Purchased Option Contracts
definition: ( YTD, % ) The contract amount of option contracts where the reporting bank has, for a fee, purchased the right to either purchase or sell an equity instrument, equity index, a commodity, or product not reportable as an interest rate or foreign exchange contract. The predominant risk characteristic is foreign exchange risk. It includes purchased exchange-traded foreign exchange options and purchased OTC foreign exchange options (gross amounts).

name: FXR
label: Foreign Exchange Rate Contracts
definition: ( YTD, % ) Notional amount of all foreign exchange contracts.

name: FXSPOT
label: Spot Foreign Exchange Rate Contracts
definition: ( YTD, $ ) The gross amount of all spot contracts committing the institution to purchase foreign currencies and U.S. dollar exchange. A spot contract is an agreement for immediate delivery of a foreign currency at the prevailing cash market rate.

name: FXSPOTR
label: Spot Foreign Exchange Rate Contracts
definition: ( YTD, % ) The gross amount of all spot contracts committing the institution to purchase foreign currencies and U.S. dollar exchange. A spot contract is an agreement for immediate delivery of a foreign currency at the prevailing cash market rate.

name: FXWOC
label: Written Option Contracts equity instrument
definition: ( YTD, $ ) The gross amount of contracts where the reporting institution has obligated itself to purchase or sell an equity instrument or equity index under exchange-traded option contracts and over-the-counter (OTC) option contracts, whose predominant risk characteristic is foreign exchange risk.

name: FXWOCR
label: Written Option Contracts equity instrument
definition: ( YTD, % ) The gross amount of contracts where the reporting institution has obligated itself to purchase or sell an equity instrument or equity index under exchange-traded option contracts and over-the-counter (OTC) option contracts, whose predominant risk characteristic is foreign exchange risk.

name: GEO
label: Geographical Location
definition: Select from National, State or Quarterly Banking Profile Region.

name: GROUP
label: institution Group
definition: Institutions can be compared to the following aggregated data: All Insured Institutions Federally Chartered State Chartered All Insured Commercial Banks Assets under $100 Million Assets $100 to $300 Million Assets $300 to $500 Million Assets $500 to 1 Billion Assets $1 to $10 Billion Assets more than $10 Billion Federally Chartered State Chartered All Insured Savings Institutions Assets under $100 Million Assets $100 to $300 Million Assets $300 to $500 Million Assets $500 to 1 Billion Assets $1 to $5 Billion Assets more than $5 Billion Federally Chartered State Chartered

name: HCLSTNOTE
label: Note for Bank Holding Company Financial Data
definition: ( Qtly, % )  Financial data for bank holding companies represent combined amounts for all FDIC-Insured bank and thrift subsidiaries, and do not reflect nondeposit subsidiaries or parent companies. Account balances have not been adjusted for intra-company transactions. Additional holding company information can be found at the website for the Federal Reserve System--National Information Center (NIC).

name: HCTMULT
label: Multi-Bank Holding Company

name: IBA
label: Insured offices of foreign banks
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Includes Bank Insurance Fund insured branches in the U.S. established by banks chartered and headquartered in foreign countries. These institutions are regulated by one of the three Federal commercial bank regulators and submit financial data to the Federal Reserve.

name: IBEFTAXA
label: Estimated Pretax Income Before Capital Adjustments
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Estimated pretax income attributable to international operations before capital allocation adjustments.

name: IBEFTAXB
label: Adjustment To Pretax Income
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Adjustment to pretax income for internal allocations to international operations to reflect the effects of equity capital on overall bank funding costs.

name: IBEFTAXC
label: Estimated Pretax Income After Capital Adjustments
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Estimated pretax income attributed to international operations after capital allocation adjustments.

name: IBEFXTR
label: Income Before Extraordinary Items
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Income (loss) before security transactions, extraordinary items and other adjustments.

name: IBEFXTRQ
label: Income Before Extraordinary Items
definition: ( Qtly, $ ) Income (loss) before security transactions, extraordinary items and other adjustments.

name: IBEFXTRQR
label: Income Before Extraordinary Items
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Income (loss) before security transactions, extraordinary items and other adjustments.

name: IBEFXTRR
label: Income Before Extraordinary Items
definition: ( YTD, % ) Income (loss) before security transactions, extraordinary items and other adjustments.

name: ICHBAL
label: Balances Due from Depository Institutions
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Total interest income on balances due from depository institutions. Excludes savings institutions filing a Thrift Financial Report.

name: ICHBALF
label: Balances Due from Depository Institutions
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total interest income on balances due from depository institutions held in foreign offices.

name: ICHBALQ
label: Balances Due from Depository Institutions
definition: ( Qtly, $ ) Total interest income on balances due from depository institutions. Excludes savings institutions filing a Thrift Financial Report.

name: ICHBALQR
label: Balances Due from Depository Institutions
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total interest income on balances due from depository institutions. Excludes savings institutions filing a Thrift Financial Report.

name: ICHBALR
label: Balances Due from Depository Institutions
definition: ( YTD, % ) Total interest income on balances due from depository institutions. Excludes savings institutions filing a Thrift Financial Report.

name: ID3REDOM
label: Real Estate Loans in Domestic Offices 30 89 days Past due
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total loans in domestic offices of the institution that are secured by real estate and are past due 30 through 89 days and still accruing interest.

name: IDAHTA
label: Less : Assets held in trading accounts for TFR Reporters
definition: ( YTD, $ )  Assets held in trading accounts for those institutions that are TFR reporters. ris definition = idahta = sum(scus, SCMUNI, SCDOMO, SCFORD, SCEQ, -SC, -SCRES)

name: IDBIFDEP
label: BIF Insured (Estimated)
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Estimated deposits Insured by the Bank Insurance Fund.

name: IDCD1T3
label: Time Deposits of $250,000 Or More: 1 To 3 Years
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Domestic time deposits of $250,000 or more that are either fixed rate instruments with remaining maturities of one through three years or floating rate instruments subject to repricing less often than yearly, but more often than once every three years. this data is available as of 2017, because remaining maturity or re-pricing frequency is now reported at the $250,000 threshold and not at the $100,000 threshold.

name: IDCD1T3S
label: Time Deposits of < $250,000: 1 - 3 Years
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Domestic time deposits of less than $250,000, plus all open-account time deposits that are either fixed rate instruments with remaining maturities of one through three years or floating rate instruments subject to repricing less often than yearly, but more often than once every three years. This data is available as of 2017, because remaining maturity or re-pricing frequency is now reported at the $250,000 threshold and not at the $100,000 threshold.

name: IDCD3LES
label: Time Deposits of $250,000 Or More: 3 Months Or Less
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Domestic time deposits of $250,000 or more that are either fixed rate instruments with remaining maturities of 3 months or less or floating rate instruments subject to repricing on a quarterly or more frequent basis. this data is available as of 2017, because remaining maturity or re-pricing frequency is now reported at the $250,000 threshold and not at the $100,000 threshold.

name: IDCD3LESS
label: Time Deposits of < $250,000: 3 Months Or Less
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Domestic time deposits of less than $250,000, plus all open-account time deposits that are either fixed rate instruments with remaining maturities of 3 months or less or floating rate instruments subject to repricing on a quarterly or more frequent basis. this data is available as of 2017, because remaining maturity or re-pricing frequency is now reported at the $250,000 threshold and not at the $100,000 threshold.

name: IDCD3T12
label: Time Deposits of $250,000 Or More: 3 To 12 Months
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Domestic time deposits of $250,000 or more that are either fixed rate instruments with remaining maturities of more than 3 months, but less than one year or floating rate instruments subject to repricing less often than quarterly, but more often than yearly. this data available as of 2017, because remaining maturity or re-pricing frequency is now reported at the $250,000 threshold and not at the $100,000 threshold.

name: IDCD3T12S
label: Time Deposits of < $250,000: 3 - 12 Months
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Domestic time deposits of less than $250,000, plus all open-account time deposits that are either fixed rate instruments with remaining maturities of more than 3 months, but less than one year or floating rate instruments subject to repricing less often than quarterly, but more often than yearly. this data is available as of 2017, because remaining maturity or re-pricing frequency is now reported at the $250,000 threshold and not at the $100,000 threshold.

name: IDCDOV3
label: Time Deposits of $250,000 Or More: 3 Or More Years
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Domestic time deposits of $100,000 or more that are either fixed rate instruments with remaining maturities of more than 3 years or floating rate instruments subject to repricing every three years or more. this data is available as of 2017, because remaining maturity or re-pricing frequency is now reported at the $250,000 threshold and not at the $100,000 threshold.

name: IDCDOV3S
label: Time Deposits of < $250,000: 3 Or More Years
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Domestic time deposits of less than $250,000, plus all open-account time deposits that are either fixed rate instruments with remaining maturities of more than 3 years or floating rate instruments subject to repricing every three years or more. this data is available as of 2017, because remaining maturity or re-pricing frequency is now reported at the $250,000 threshold and not at the $100,000 threshold.

name: IDCMED
label: Contracts on Other Commodities and Equities
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total equity derivative contracts and commodity and other contracts (notional amount). This item is not available prior to March 1995.

name: IDCMSANM
label: Consolidated Metropolitan Statistical Area
definition: ( Qtly, % ) The Consolidated Metropolitan Statistical Area (CMSA) in which the institution is physically located. The Office of Management and Budget defines CMSAs as consisting of two or more contiguous Metropolitan Statistical Areas with a combined population of over 1 million.

name: IDCRREDM
label: Real Estate Loans in Domestic Offices
definition: ( Qtly, % ) The total amount of recoveries of loans secured by real estate and held in domestic offices of the institution. RIS definition:  YR - IDCRREDM = SUM(CRRECONS, CRREAG, CRRERES, CRREMULT, CRRENRES)  QTR - IDCRREDQ = SUM(CRRECONQ, CRREAGQ, CRRERESQ, CRREMULQ, CRRENRSQ)

name: IDCTDER
label: Notional Amount of Credit Derivatives
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Notional amount of credit derivatives on which the institution is either the guarantor or beneficiary. Credit derivatives are off-balance sheet arrangements that allow one party (the beneficiary) to transfer the credit risk of an asset to another party (the guarantor). RIS definition: IDCTDER = (CTDERGTY + CTDERBEN)

name: IDDEPINR
label: % Insured (Estimated)
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Estimated amount of Insured deposits as a percent of total deposit liabilities before exclusions (gross) as defined in section 3(l) of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act and FDIC regulations. Available in the FDIC Institution Directory beginning in March 2009.  NOTE: Although standard FDIC insurance coverage was temporarily raised from $100,000 to $250,000 in October 2008, institutions are required to report the source elements for this estimate based on the $100,000 coverage limit through June 2009. Beginning with the September 30, 2009 reporting period, institutions are required to report based on the $250,000 coverage limit.   RIS definition: IDDEPINR = (DEPINS / DEPBEFEX) *100

name: IDDEPLAM
label: Amount ($) - Deposit Accounts of More Than $250,000
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Beginning September 2009, amount($) of deposit accounts of more than $250,000 held in domestic offices and in Insured branches in Puerto Rico and U.S. territories and possessions. ris definition: if >= sept 2009 then iddeplam = deplgamt

name: IDDEPLGB
label: Number (#) - Deposit Accounts of More Than $250,000
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Beginning September 2009, number of individual deposit accounts of more than $250,000 held in domestic offices and Insured U.S. branches of a foreign chartered institutions (IBAs). ris definition: if >= sept 2009 then iddeplgb = deplgb

name: IDDEPSAM
label: Amount ($) - Deposit Accounts Equal To Or Less Than $250,000
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Beginning September 2009, amount of deposit accounts of $250,000 or less (excluding retirement accounts) held in domestic offices and in Insured branches in Puerto Rico and U.S. territories and possessions. Amounts are reported based on the temporary increase to the standard insurance limit to $250,000. ris definition: if >= sept 2009 then iddepsam = depsmamt;

name: IDDEPSMB
label: Number (#) - Deposit Accounts Equal To Or Less Than $250,000
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Beginning September 2009, number (#) of deposit accounts of $250,000 or less held in domestic offices. This is listed as a memoranda only. call reporters provide this item only on the June call report. TFR reporters provide this item each quarter. ris Definition: if >= Sept 2009 then IDdepsmb = depsmb

name: IDDIVNIR
label: Cash Dividends To Net Income (YTD Only)
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total of all cash dividends declared (year-to-date, annualized) as a percent of net income (year-to-date, annualized). * this ratio is not available on a quarterly basis. if the denominator is less than or equal to zero, then ratio is shown as 'N/A.' RIS definition = IDDIVNIR = (EQCDIVA / NETINCA) *100

name: IDDRREDM
label: Real Estate Loans in Domestic Offices
definition: ( Qtly, % ) The total amount of charged-off loans secured by real estate and held in domestic offices of the institution. RIS definitions:   YTD -IDDRREDM = SUM(DRRECONS, DRREAG, DRRERES, DRREMULT, DRRENRES)  QTR - IDDRREDQ = sum(drreconq,drreagq,drreresq,drremulq,drrenrsq)

name: IDEOTH
label: Additional Noninterest Expense
definition: ( Qtly, % ) This includes all other operating expenses of the institution. These may consist of net (gains) or losses on OREO, loans sales, fixed assets sales, amortization of intangible assets, or other itemized expenses. Beginning in June 1996, this does not include losses on asset sales for TFR reporters. Such gains (losses) are included net in noninterest income.  RIS definition:  YR - IDEOTH = EOTHNINT + EAMINTAN (>2000) or IDEOTH=EOTHNINT  QTR - IDOTHNIQ = NONIIQ - SUM(IFIDUCQ, ISERCHGQ, IGLTRDQ)

name: IDEOTHINT
label: Other Interest Expense
definition: ( Qtly, % ) The interest expense for trading liabilities, other borrowed money and subordinated notes & debentures for banks filing a FFIEC Call Report 51, banks with domestic offices only and total assets RIS Definition: If CALLFORM = 51 then ideothint = eothint If CALLFORM = 51 then ideothintq = eothintq Standard Peers: ideothint = sum(eothint, -ettlotmg, -esubnd) ideothintq = sum(eothintq, - ettlotmqy, - esubndq).

name: IDERNCVQR
label: Earnings Coverage of Net Loan Charge-Offs(x)
definition: ( Qtly, % )  Income before income taxes and extraordinary items and other adjustments, plus provisions for loan and lease losses and allocated transfer risk reserve, plus gains (losses) on securities not held in trading accounts (annualized) divided by net loan and lease charge-offs (annualized). This is a number of times ratio (x) not a percentage ratio (%). * if the denominator is less than or equal to zero, then ratio is shown as 'n/a. ris definition = iderncvr = chfla / ntlnlsa

name: IDERNCVR
label: Earnings Coverage of Net Loan Charge-Offs(x)
definition: ( YTD, % ) Income before income taxes and extraordinary items and other adjustments, plus provisions for loan and lease losses and allocated transfer risk reserve, plus gains (losses) on securities not held in trading accounts (annualized) divided by net loan and lease charge-offs (annualized). This is a number of times ratio (x) not a percentage ratio (%). * if the denominator is less than or equal to zero, then ratio is shown as 'n/a. ris definition = iderncvr = chfla / ntlnlsa

name: IDFRANUM
label: Number of Fiduciary Accounts and Related Asset Accounts
definition: ( Qtly, % ) The total number of Fiduciary Accounts and Related Asset Accounts ris definition: idfranum = ttnanum + ttnmnum

name: IDLNCORR
label: Net Loans and Leases to Core Deposits
definition: ( YTD, % ) Loan and lease financing receivables, net of allowances and reserves, as a percent of core deposits. The core deposit definition was changed in March 2011. core deposits held in domestic offices now includes: total domestic office deposits minus time deposits of more than $250,000 held in domestic offices and brokered deposits of $250,000 or less held in domestic offices. Prior to the March 2010, core deposits were calculated as total domestic office deposits minus time deposits of $100,000 or more held in domestic offices. RIS definition: IDLNCORR = (LNLSNET / COREDEP) *100

name: IDLNDACF
label: Loans To Depository Institutions & Acceptances of Other Banks – Foreign Offices
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Acceptances of U.S. banks held in foreign offices, acceptances of foreign banks held in foreign offices and loans to depository institutions held in foreign offices. Beginning June 2001 it includes acceptances for IBAS also.  RIS definition: IDLNDACF = SUM(LNDEPAC, -LNDEPACD, 0)

name: IDLNLS
label: Loans and Leases, Gross
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Loans and lease financing receivables of the institution, including unearned income. RIS definition: IDLNLS = LNLS or SUM(LNLSGR, LNCONTRA, -uninc) <=9606

name: IDLNLSGR
label: Total Loans & Leases
definition: ( Qtly, % )  Loans and lease financing receivables, net of unearned income, on a consolidated basis ris definition = idlnlsgr = lnlsgr

name: IDMSANM
label: Metropolitan Statistical Area
definition: The Metropolitan Statistical Area (MSA) in which the institution is physically located. The Office of Management and Budget defines MSAs in terms of entire counties surrounding central cities, except in the six New England states where they are defined in terms of cities and towns within counties.

name: IDNAREDM
label: Real Estate Loans in Domestic Offices in Nonaccrual Status
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total loans in domestic offices of the institution that are secured by real estate and are no longer accruing interest.  RIS definition: IDNAREDM = SUM(NARECONS, NAREAG, NARERES, NAREMULT, NARENRES)

name: IDNCATOR
label: Automobile loans
definition: ( YTD and Qtly, % ) Automobile loans 90 days or more past due and nonaccrual as a percent of total automobile loans to Individuals. The loans include all loans arising from retail sales of passenger cars and other vehicles such as minivans, vans, sport-utility vehicles, pickup trucks, and similar light trucks for personal use charged-off and recovered. Available as of March 2011. ris definition: idncator = (ncauto / lnauto) * 100

name: IDNCCIR
label: Commercial & Industrial Loans
definition: ( YTD and Qtly, % ) Commercial and industrial loans 90 days or more past due and nonaccrual as a percent of total commercial and industrial loans. Note: For banks with assets of less than $300 million prior to 2001, this item includes all other loans (loans to depository institutions, agricultural loans, etc...). ris definition: idnccir = (ncci / lnci) * 100

name: IDNCCONR
label: Loans to Individuals
definition: ( YTD and Qtly, % ) Loans to Individuals for household, family and other personal expenditures 90 days or more past due and nonaccrual as a percent of total consumer loans. ris definition: idncconr = (nccon/lncon)* 100

name: IDNCCOOR
label: Other Loans to Individuals
definition: ( YTD and Qtly, % ) Other loans to Individuals for household, family and other personal expenditures 90 days or more past due and nonaccrual as a percent of total other loans to Individuals (includes single payment, installment and all student loans). ris definition: idnccoor = ((ncconoth + ncauto) / (lnconorp + lnauto)

name: IDNCCOTR
label: Other Consumer Loans
definition: ( YTD and Qtly, % ) Other consumer loans Other loans to Individuals other consumer loans 90 days or more past due and nonaccrual as a percent of total other loans to Individuals. The loans are for household, family and other personal expenditures including single payment, installment and all student loans. Before March 2011 loans also includes automobile loans. ris definition: idnccotr = (ncconoth / lnconorp * 100

name: IDNCCRDR
label: Credit Cards & Related Plans
definition: ( YTD and Qtly, % ) Credit card loans to Individuals for household, family and other personal expenditures 90 days or more past due and nonaccrual as a percent of total credit card and related plan loans. note: prior to 2001, included revolving credit plans other than credit cards. ris definition: idnccrdr = (nccrcd / lncrcd)* 100

name: IDNCGTPR
label: Noncurrent Loans Which are Wholly or Partially Guaranteed by the U.S. Government
definition: ( YTD and Qtly, % ) Noncurrent Loans and leases wholly or partially guaranteed or Insured by the U.S. Government as a percent of total noncurrent loans and leases. Noncurrent loans and leases are loans that are past due 90 days or more or in nonaccrual status. The U.S. Government includes its agencies and its government-sponsored agencies. Examples include loans guaranteed by the FDIC (through loss-sharing arrangements in FDIC-assisted acquisitions), the Small Business Administration, and the Federal Housing Administration. Excluded are loans and leases guaranteed or Insured by state or local governments, state or local government agencies, foreign (non-U.S.) governments, and private agencies or organizations. Also excluded are loans and leases collateralized by securities issued by the U.S. Government, including its agencies and its government-sponsored agencies. Included in noncurrent total assets. ris definition = idncgtpr =(ncgtypar / nclnls) *100

name: IDNCLTAR
label: Net Non Core Funding to Long Term Assets
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Non core liabilities, less short term investments, as a percent of long term assets. non core liabilities consist of: time certificates of deposit and open time deposits of $100,000 or more, other borrowed money, foreign office deposits, federal funds purchased and securities sold under agreements to repurchase in domestic offices, brokered deposits issued in denominations of less than $100,000 and demand notes issued to the U.S. Treasury. Short term investments consist of: interest-bearing bank balances, federal funds sold and securities purchased under agreements to resell in domestic offices, debt securities that mature within one year, acceptances of other banks and commercial paper. Long term assets consist of: loan and lease financing receivables, net of allowances and reserves, less acceptances of other banks and commercial paper, plus equity securities and debt securities that mature in over one year and other real estate owned (noninvestment. *  This item is only available for Call Reporters and is not available for TFR Reporters. RIS definition = IDNCLTAR = (SUM(NTRTMLG, OTHBOR, DEPFORW, FREPP, TTL, BROINSSM, - CHBALI, -FFSOLD, -SCMA1LES, -LNACOTH, -LNCOMPA) / (SUM(LNLSNET, -LNACOTH, - LNCOMPA, OREOTH, SCHA, SCHF, -SCMA1LES)) * 100

name: IDNCOTHR
label: All other Loans & Leases (Including Farm)
definition: ( YTD and Qtly, % ) Other loans and leases (including loans to depository institutions and acceptances of other banks, loans to foreign governments and official institutions, lease financing receivables, and loans to finance agricultural production and other loans to farmers) which are 90 days or more past due and nonaccrual as a percent of total other loans and leases. ris definition: idncothr = ((ncdep + ncfg + ncothln + ncls + ncag) / (lnotci + lnag)) * 100

name: IDNTATOR
label: Loans Automobile Loans
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Net charged-off other loans to Individuals for automobiles (annualized) as a percent of average automobile loans to Individuals, which include all loans arising from retail sales of passenger cars and other vehicles such as minivans, vans, sport-utility vehicles, pickup trucks, and similar light trucks for personal use charged-off and recovered. Available as of March 2011. RIS Definitions:  YTD - IDNTATOR = (NTAUTOA / LNAUTO5) * 100  QTR - NTAUTOQR

name: IDNTCIQR
label: Commercial & Industrial Loans
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Net charged-off commercial and industrial loans (annualized) as a percent of average total commercial and industrial loans. ris definitions: ytd - idntcir = (ntcia/lnci5)* 100 qtr - idntciqr = ((ntciq * 4) / lnci22) * 100

name: IDNTCIR
label: Commercial & Industrial Loans
definition: ( YTD, % ) NET charged-off commercial and industrial loans (annualized) as a percent of average total commercial and industrial loans. ris definitions: ytd - idntcir = (ntcia/lnci5)* 100 qtr - idntciqr = ((ntciq * 4) / lnci22) * 100

name: IDNTCONR
label: Loans to Individuals
definition: ( YTD, % ) NET charged-off loans to Individuals for household, family and other personal expenditures (annualized) as a percent of average total loans to Individuals. ris definitions: ytd - idntconr = (ntcona/lncon5) * 100 qtr - idntcnqr = ((ntconq * 4) / lncon2) * 100

name: IDNTCOOQR
label: Other Loans to Individuals
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Net charge-offs for other loans to Individuals (and related plans)  for automobiles, household, family and other personal expenditures (annualized) as a percent of average total other loans to Individuals. ris definitions: ytd - idntcoor = (( ntconota+ntautoa) / (lnconot5+lnauto5)) * 100 qtr - idntcoqr = ((ntconotq + ntautoq)*4 / (lnconot2 + lnauto2))* 100

name: IDNTCOOR
label: Other Loans to Individuals
definition: ( YTD, % ) NET charge-offs for other loans to Individuals (and related plans) for automobiles, household, family and other personal expenditures (annualized) as a percent of average total other loans to Individuals. ris definitions: ytd - idntcoor = (( ntconota+ntautoa) / (lnconot5+lnauto5)) * 100 qtr - idntcoqr = ((ntconotq + ntautoq)*4 / (lnconot2 + lnauto2))* 100

name: IDNTCOTR
label: Loans Other Consumer Loans
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Net charged off other loans to Individuals for the consumer loans(annualized)as percent of average consumer loans to Individuals, which include all other extensions of credit to Individuals for household, family and other personnel expenditures charged-off and recovered. Include automobile loans before 2011. RIS Definitions:  YTD – IDNTCOTR = (NTCONOTA / LNCONOT5) * 100  QTR - NTCONTQR

name: IDNTCRDQR
label: Credit Cards & Related Plans
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Net charged-off credit card loans to Individuals (annualized) as a percent of average total credit card loans. Note: prior to 2001, included revolving credit plans other than credit cards. ris definitions: ytd - IDNTCRDR = (NTCRCDA/LNCRCD5) * 100 QTR - IDNTCDQR = ((NTCRCDQ * 4) / LNCRCD2) * 100

name: IDNTCRDR
label: Credit Cards & Related Plans
definition: ( YTD, % ) NET charged-off credit card loans to Individuals (annualized) as a percent of average total credit card loans. Note: prior to 2001, included revolving credit plans other than credit cards. ris definitions: ytd - IDNTCRDR = (NTCRCDA/LNCRCD5) * 100 QTR - IDNTCDQR = ((NTCRCDQ * 4) / LNCRCD2) * 100

name: IDNTIGR
label: % of institutions With Earnings Gains
definition: ( Qtly, % ) The percent of institutions that increased their net income (or decreased their losses) compared to the same period a year earlier. Available for peer group data only. ris definition = idntigr = (ntinchpp/instcnt) *100 (macro only)

name: IDNTILR
label: % of Unprofitable Institutions
definition: ( Qtly, % ) The percent of institutions whose year-to-date net income was negative. Available for peer group data only.  RIS definition:  YR - IDNTILR = (NTINCL / INSTCNT) *100 (Macro only)  QTR - IDNTILRQ = (NTINCLQ / INSTCNT) *100 (Macro only)

name: IDNTOTHR
label: Loans All Other Loans and Lease
definition: ( Qtly, % ) NET charged-off loans to depository institutions and acceptances of other banks, loans to foreign governments and official institutions, lease financing receivables, loans to finance agricultural production and all other loans (annualized) as a percent of average total other loans and leases. ris definitions: ytd - idntothr = ((((ntdep + ntforgv + ntother + ntls) * idann) + ntaga) / (lnotci5 + lnag5)) * 100 qtr - idntotqr = (((ntdepq + ntforgvq + ntothq + ntlsq + ntagq) * 4) / (lnotci2 + lnag22)) * 100

name: IDNTRCDS
label: Time Deposits of Less Than $100,000
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Time certificates of deposit and open-account time deposits with balances of less than $100,000 held in domestic offices. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: IDNTREDM
label: Real Estate Loans in Domestic Offices
definition: ( Qtly, % ) The net amount of charged-off loans secured by real estate and held in domestic offices of the institution.  RIS definition:  YR - IDNTREDM = SUM(NTRECONS, NTREAG, NTRERES, NTREMULT, NTRENRES)  QTR - IDNTREDQ = SUM(NTRECONQ,NTREAGQ,NTRERESQ,NTREMULQ,NTRENRSQ)

name: IDNULL
label: This Data Item Is Not Available
definition: ( Qtly, % ) This is a filler data item used by the system because the data item is not available, not collected or not meaningful.

name: IDOA
label: All Other Assets
definition: ( Qtly, % ) All other assets include investments in unconsolidated subsidiaries, customers' liability on acceptances outstanding, income earned not collected on loans, net deferred tax assets, excess residential mortgage servicing fees receivable and other assets. Beginning in June 2009, includes direct and indirect investments in real estate ventures for CALL Reporters.  RIS definition: IDOA = SUM(OA, INVSUB, CUSLI) or >=0906 IDOA = SUM(OA, INVSUB, CUSLI, INVSUORE)

name: IDOAA
label: All other assets
definition: ( YTD, $ ) All other assets include investments in unconsolidated subsidiaries, customers' liability on acceptances outstanding, income earned not collected on loans, net deferred tax assets, excess residential mortgage servicing fees receivable and other assets. Beginning in June 2009, includes direct and indirect investments in real estate ventures for CALL Reporters. RIS definition: IDOA = SUM(OA, INVSUB, CUSLI) or >=0906 IDOA = SUM(OA, INVSUB, CUSLI, INVSUORE)

name: IDOBRMTG
label: Other Borrowed Funds
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Other borrowed money (excludes deposits, federal funds purchased, securities sold under agreements to repurchase in domestic offices of the bank, and trading liabilities). As of March 1997, includes mortgage indebtedness and obligations under capitalized leases. ris definition = idobrmtg = sum(ttl, othbor, mtgls, 0)

name: IDOLIAB
label: All Other Liabilities
definition: ( Qtly, % ) The bank's liability on acceptances executed and outstanding, interest and other expenses accrued and unpaid (including accrued income taxes payable), net deferred tax liabilities and minority interest in consolidated subsidiaries. as of March 1997, limited-life preferred stock and related surplus are no longer reported here but as a part of subordinated debt. effective January 1, 1994, revaluation losses on assets held in trading accounts are included in trading liabilities. Beginning March 2009, non-controlling (minority) interests in consolidated subsidiaries are a component of equity capital and not included in this item. RIS definition = IDOLIAB = SUM(OLMIN, ACEPT, LLPFDSTK, 0)

name: IDOTHLNS
label: Other Loans
definition: ( Qtly, % ) All other loans on a consolidated basis plus prepaid taxes and insurance on mortgage loans for TFR reporters.  RIS definition: IDOTHLNS = SUM(LNOTHER, LNREPP)

name: IDOTHNII
label: Additional Noninterest Income
definition: ( Qtly, % )  Includes the following noninterest income: investment banking, advisory, brokerage, and underwriting; Venture capital revenue; Net Servicing fees; Net securitization income; Insurance commission fees and income; Net gains (losses) on sales of loans; Net gains (losses) on sales of real estate owned; Net gains (losses) on sales of other assets (excluding securities);and Other noninterest income. RIS definition = IDOTHNII = NONII - SUM(IFIDUC, ISERCHG, IGLTRAD)

name: IDOTRAN
label: Other Transaction Accounts
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Automated Transfer Service (ATS) accounts and telephone or preauthorized transfer accounts held in domestic offices. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: IDP3REDM
label: Real Estate Loans in Domestic Offices, Past Due 30 - 89 Days
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total loans in domestic offices of the institution that are secured by real estate and are past due 30 through 89 days and still accruing interest.  RIS definition: IDP3REDM = SUM(P3RECONS, P3REAG, P3RERES, P3REMULT, P3RENRES)

name: IDP9REDM
label: Real Estate Loans in Domestic Offices, Past Due 90+ Days
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total loans in domestic offices of the institution that are secured by real estate and are past due more than 90 days and still accruing interest.  RIS definition: IDP9REDM = SUM(P9RECONS, P9REAG, P9RERES, P9REMULT, P9RENRES)

name: IDPRETX
label: Pre-Tax Net Operating Income
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Net income (loss) before income taxes and extraordinary items and other adjustments minus gains (losses) on securities not held in trading accounts.  RIS definition:  YR - IDPRETX = SUM(IBEFTAX, -IGLSEC)  QTR - IDPRETXQ = SUM(IBEFTXQ, -IGLSECQ)

name: IDQSALE
label: Quarterly Mutual Fund Sales
definition: ( Qtly, % ) The total sales of debt securities, money market, annuities and other mutual funds (including proprietary, private label and third party mutual funds) in domestic offices that are made during the quarter.

name: IDSAIFDE
label: SAIF Insured (Estimated)
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Estimated deposits Insured by the Savings Association Insurance Fund

name: IDSCAFAA
label: Market To Book Value Available for Sale Securities
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total available-for-sale (fair market value) securities divided by total available-for-sale (amortized cost) securities.

name: IDSCAS
label: Non-mortgage backed: issued by U.S. government agencies or sponsored  agencies (GSEs)
definition: ( Qtly, % ) U.S. government agency and corporation obligations (excluding mortgage-backed securities) issued by U.S. government agencies and by U.S. Government-enterprises (GSEs)that are held-to-maturity at amortized cost and available-for-sale at fair value on a consolidated basis. beginning January 1, 1994, this item consists of both securities designated as held-to-maturity, reported at amortized cost, and securities designated as available-for-sale, reported at fair market value. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.The last TFR was filed December 2011.

name: IDSCCMMB
label: Commercial Mortgage-Backed Securities - Other
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Other commercial mortgage-backed securities on a consolidated basis. Commercial mortgage-backed securities not included in U.S. government obligations. note: data begins in June 2009. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.The last TFR report was filed December 2011. RIS Definition: Starting March 2011: IDSCCMMB= SUM (SCCMMB,-SCCPTG,-SCCMOG). Else IDSCCMMB = SCCMMB.

name: IDSCCMO
label: Collateralized Mortgage Obligations
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Mortgage-backed securities (CMOs and REMICS) held-to-maturity at amortized cost and available-for-sale at fair value which are either issued or guaranteed through FNMA or FHLMC, or privately issued and collateralized by mortgage-backed securities issued or guaranteed by FNMA, FHLMC, or GNMA and all other privately-issued. This includes securities held in trading accounts and privately issued collateralized mortgage obligations (REMICS) forTFR reporters. ris definition = idsccmo = (sccol + scodpi)

name: IDSCCMT
label: Commercial Mortgage-Backed Securities U.S. Government-Sponsored
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Commercial mortgage pass-through securities and other commercial mortgage-backed securities (issued by U.S. government-sponsored agencies or by others) on a consolidated basis   RIS definition: IDSCCMT = SUM(SCCMPT, SCCMOT)

name: IDSCEQ
label: Equity securities not held for trading
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Available-for-sale equity securities at fair value and equity securities with readily determinable fair values not held for trading. includes all investments in mutual funds and other equity securities with easy to determine fair values that are not held for trading. Such securities include, but are not limited to, money market mutual funds, mutual funds that invest solely in U.S. Government securities, common stock, and perpetual preferred stock. Reporting equity securities with readily determinable fair values begins in March 2018 and is reported by institutions that have adopted FASB Accounting Standards Update No. 2016-01 (ASU 2016-01) for fiscal years beginning after December 15, 2017. RIS definition: IDSCEQ = SUM(SCEQ,SCEQFV)

name: IDSCGTPC
label: Certificates of Participation in Pools of Residential Mortgages
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Mortgage-backed pass-through securities held-to-maturity at amortized cost and available-for-sale at fair value, which are either issued or guaranteed through FNMA, FHLMC, or GNMA or privately-issued. This includes securities held in trading accounts for TFR reporters. ris definition = idscgtpc = (scgty + scodpc)

name: IDSCHFHA
label: Market To Book Value Securities
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total fair market value of securities portfolio (both held-to-maturity and available-for-sale securities) as a percent of its total book value. This information is available for Call Reporters only and is not available for TFR Reporters* This information is available for Call Reporters only and is not available for TFR Reporters.

name: IDSCIMF
label: Investments in Mutual Funds
definition: ( Qtly, % )  Equity securities invested in mutual funds and other equity securities with readily determinable fair values. Available for Call Reporters only.

name: IDSCOD
label: Privately issued residential mortgage-backed securities
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Mortgage-backed pass-through securities and mortgage-backed securities – (CMOs) and (REMICs) - privately-issued and collateralized by MBS issued or guaranteed by FNMA, FHLMC, or GNMA and all other privately-issued held-to-maturity at amortized cost and available-for-sale at fair value on a consolidated basis     Note:  1) Prior to June 2009, this item included commercial mortgage pass-through securities and commercial mortgage-backed securities  2) Includes the aforementioned securities held in trading accounts for TFR filers   RIS definition: IDSCOD = SUM(SCODPC, SCODPI)

name: IDSCODDS
label: Other Domestic Debt Securities
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total other domestic debt securities. Prior to 2001, this item included asset backed securities and 'foreign debt securities' for institutions that filed a FFIEC Call Report and had less than $100 million in total assets. For TFR reporters prior to 2001, this item includes securities held in trading accounts but excludes privately-issued collateralized mortgage obligations (including remics). ris definition = idscodds = sum(scdomo, -scabs, 0)

name: IDSLCAUT
label: Auto Loans Before June 2018
definition: ( Qtly, % ) This line item ends March 2018, institutions now report totals by loan category. auto loans - 	 maximum amount of credit exposure arising from recourse	 Or Other Seller-Provided Credit Enhancements Provided To Structures Reported In RC-S, Item 1 In The Form Of: 	 Standby Letters Of Credit And Other Enhancements -	 Auto Loans.	 RIS Definitions: Use SZSLCAUT when >= 2003 and prior to 20030102 use SZLCAUTO.

name: IDSLCCCD
label: Credit Cards Rec. Before June 2018
definition: ( Qtly, % ) This line item ends March 2018, institutions now report totals by loan category. credit cards receivables - maximum amount of credit exposure arising from Recourse or Other Seller-Provided Credit Enhancements Provided To Structures Reported In RC-S, Item 1 In The Form Of: Standby Letters Of Credit and Other Enhancements - Credit Card Receivables. RIS Definitions: Use SZSLCCRD when >= 2003 and prior to 20030101 use SZLCCRD.

name: IDSLCCCI
label: C&I Loans Before June 2018
definition: ( Qtly, % ) This line item ends March 2018, institutions now report totals by loan category. commercial & industrial loans	 maximum amount of credit exposure arising From Recourse	 Or Other Seller-Provided Credit Enhancements Provided To Structures Reported In RC-S, Item 1 In The Form Of: 	 Standby Letters Of Credit And Other Enhancements -	 Commercial And Industrial Loans. RIS Definitions: Use SZSLCCI when >= 2003 and prior to 2003 use SZLCCI.

name: IDSLCCON
label: Other Consumer Loans Before June18
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Other Consumer Loans, Maximum Amount Of Credit Exposure Arising From Recourse Or Other Seller-Provided Credit Enhancements Provided To Structures Reported In RC-S, Item 1 In The Form Of: Standby Letters Of Credit And Other Enhancements - Other Consumer Loans. ris definitions: use szslccon >= 2003 and prior to 2003 use szlccon.

name: IDSLCHEL
label: Home Equity Lines Before June 2018
definition: ( Qtly, % ) This line item ends March 2018, institutions now report totals by loan category. home equity lines - maximum amount of credit exposure arising from recourse or Other Seller-Provided Credit Enhancements Provided To Structures Reported In RC-S, Item 1 In The Form Of: Standby Letters Of Credit And Other Enhancements - Home Equity Lines. RIS Definitions: Use SZSLCHEL when >= 2003 and prior to 20030101 use SZLCHEL.

name: IDSLCOTH
label: All Other Loans.&Ls Before June 2018
definition: ( Qtly, % ) All Other Loans and All Leases Maximum Amount Of Credit Exposure Arising From Recourse Or Other Seller-Provided Credit Enhancements Provided To Structures Reported In RC-S, Item 1 In The Form Of: Standby Letters Of Credit And Other Enhancements - Other Loans, All Leases and Other Assets. ris definitions: use szslcoth >= 2003 and prior to 2003 use szlcoth.

name: IDSLCRES
label: 1-4 Family Res. Loans Before June 2018
definition: ( Qtly, % ) This line item ends March 2018, institutions now report totals by loan category. 1-4 family residential loans, maximum amount of credit exposure arising from Recourse or Other Seller-Provided Credit Enhancements Provided To Structures Reported In RC-S, Item 1 In The Form Of: Standby Letters Of Credit And Other Enhancements - 1-4 Family Residential Loans.	 RIS Definitions: Use SZSLCRES when >=2003 and prior to 20030101 use SZLCRES.

name: IDT1CER
label: Common Equity Tier 1 Capital Ratio
definition: ( YTD and Qtly, % ) The ratio of common equity tier 1 capital to risk-weighted assets. beginning March 2020, this ratio in not required nor available for an institution that has elected the Community Bank leverage Ratio (CBLR) framework. Also as of March 2020, this ratio is not available for standard peer groups. Custom peer groups will only contain data for those that have not elected the CBLR framework. Common equity tier 1 capital includes common stock instruments and related surplus, retained earnings, accumulated other comprehensive income (AOCI), and limited amounts of common equity tier 1 minority interest, minus applicable regulatory adjustments and deductions. Items that are fully deducted from common equity tier 1 capital include goodwill, other intangible assets (excluding mortgage servicing assets) and certain deferred tax assets; items that are subject to limits in common equity tier 1 capital include mortgage servicing assets, eligible deferred tax assets, and certain significant investments. As of March 2015, all institutions began reporting the amended CALL schedule RC-R Part I and Part II which incorporates risk-based capital rules based on the Basel III framework and section 939A of the Dodd-Frank Act. Some designated institutions began reporting based on the updated requirements as of March 2014. (See: FDIC Financial Institutions Letter FIL-24-2012) Available beginning March 2014.

name: IDT1RWAJR
label: Tier 1 Risk-Based Capital Ratio
definition: ( YTD and Qtly, % ) Tier 1 (core) capital as a percent of risk-weighted assets as defined by the appropriate federal regulator for prompt corrective action during that time period. beginning March 2020, this ratio in not required nor available for an institution that has elected the Community Bank leverage Ratio (CBLR) framework. Also as of March 2020, this ratio is not available for standard peer groups. Custom peer groups will only contain data for those that have not elected the CBLR framework. As of March 2015, all institutions began reporting the amended CALL schedule RC-R Part I and Part II which incorporates risk-based capital rules based on the Basel III framework and section 939A of the Dodd-Frank Act. Some designated institutions began reporting based on the updated requirements as of March 2014. (See: FDIC Financial Institutions Letter FIL-24-2012)

name: IDTFRA
label: Total Fiduciary and Related Assets
definition: ( Qtly, % ) The sum of managed and non-managed assets reported quarterly by institutions with total fiduciary assets greater than $250 million (prior December) or with fiduciary and related services income greater than 10% of revenue (net interest income plus noninterest income) for the prior calendar year. ris definition: idTFRa = ttma + ttnma

name: IDTRCERT
label: Certified and Official Checks
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total certified and official checks held in both domestic and foreign offices.

name: IDTRCOMB
label: Commercial Banks and Other Depository Institutions in U.S.
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total transaction and nontransaction accounts of commercial banks and other depository institutions that held in both domestic and foreign offices.  RIS definition: IDTRCOMB = (TRNCBO + NTRCOMOT)

name: IDTRFCFG
label: Foreign Deposits
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total transaction and nontransaction accounts of banks in foreign countries, foreign governments and official institutions (includes foreign central banks) held in both domestic and foreign offices.

name: IDTRN
label: Total Deposit Liabilities
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total transaction and nontransaction accounts held in both domestic and foreign offices. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR Reports ended in December 2011. with assets less than $300 million and risk-based capital ratios in excess of 12 percent.

name: IDTRNFC
label: Total transaction and nontransaction accounts of Banks in Foreign Countries
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total transaction and nontransaction accounts of banks in foreign countries held in both domestic and foreign offices. It also includes IBFs established by U.S. branches and agencies of foreign banks. This item is not reported by institutions with less than $100 million in total assets.  RIS definition: IDTRNFC = (TRNFC + NTRFC)

name: IDTRNFG
label: Foreign Governments and Official Institutions
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total transaction and nontransaction accounts of foreign governments and official institutions (includes foreign central banks) held in both domestic and foreign offices. This item is not reported by institutions with less than $100 million in total assets.  RIS definition: IDTRNFG = (TRNFG + NTRFG)

name: IDTRNGOV
label: U.S. Government
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total transaction and nontransaction accounts of federal public funds made by or for the account of the U.S. government which are held in domestic offices. It includes U.S. Treasury tax and loan accounts, standing deposits to the credit of certain quasi-governmental institutions and deposits of the U.S. Postal Service and local post offices.  RIS definition = IDTRNGOV = (TRNUSGOV + NTRUSGOV)

name: IDTRNI
label: Individuals, Partnerships, and Corporations
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total transaction and nontransaction accounts of Individuals, partnerships and corporations (including all certified and official checks) held in both domestic and foreign offices. prior to 2004, This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR Reports ended in December 2011. with assets less than $300 million and risk-based capital ratios in excess of 12 percent. RIS definition = IDTRNI = (TRNIPCOC + NTRIPC)

name: IDTRNMU
label: States and Political Subdivisions in The U.S.
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total transaction and nontransaction accounts of states, counties, municipalities, and local housing authorities (or political subdivisions) held in domestic offices. Included are deposits of funds advanced to states and political subdivisions by the U.S. government and corporations, and deposits of withheld income taxes of states and political subdivisions.  RIS definition: IDTRNMU = (TRNMUNI + NTRMUNI)

name: IDTRNUS
label: Other Depository Institutions in The U.S.
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total transaction and nontransaction accounts of other depository institutions in the U.S., other than commercial banks, held in domestic offices. It includes deposits of buildings or savings and loan associations, homestead associations, and cooperative banks; mutual and stock savings banks, and credit unions.

name: IDTRRVAL
label: Revaluation gains on off-balance sheet contracts
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Trading liabilities revaluation gains on interest rate, foreign exchange rate, and other commodity and equity contracts. This item is only available for banks with $1 billion or more in total assets or banks with $2 billion or more in notional amount of interest rate, foreign exchange rate, and other commodity and equity contracts.  RIS definition: IDTRRVAL = (TRREVALD + TRREVALF)

name: IFIDUC
label: Fiduciary Activities, Gross Income
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Income from services rendered by the institution's trust department or by any of its consolidated subsidiaries acting in any fiduciary capacity. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: IFIDUCQ
label: Fiduciary Activities
definition: ( Qtly, $ ) Income from services rendered by the institution's trust department or by any of its consolidated subsidiaries acting in any fiduciary capacity. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: IFIDUCQR
label: Fiduciary Activities
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Income from services rendered by the institution's trust department or by any of its consolidated subsidiaries acting in any fiduciary capacity. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: IFIDUCR
label: Fiduciary Activities
definition: ( YTD, % ) Income from services rendered by the institution's trust department or by any of its consolidated subsidiaries acting in any fiduciary capacity. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: IFIDUC_1
label: Fiduciary Activities
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Income from services rendered by the institution's trust department or by any of its consolidated subsidiaries acting in any fiduciary capacity. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: IFREPO
label: Federal Funds Sold
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Interest income on federal funds sold and securities purchased under agreements to resell in domestic offices of the bank. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: IFREPOQ
label: Federal Funds Sold
definition: ( Qtly, $ ) Interest income on federal funds sold and securities purchased under agreements to resell in domestic offices of the bank. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: IFREPOQR
label: Federal Funds Sold
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Interest income on federal funds sold and securities purchased under agreements to resell in domestic offices of the bank. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: IFREPOR
label: Federal Funds Sold
definition: ( YTD, % ) Interest income on federal funds sold and securities purchased under agreements to resell in domestic offices of the bank. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: IGLCMEX
label: Commodity and Other Exposures
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Trading revenues on commodity and other exposures such as cash instruments and off-balance sheet derivative instruments. beginning in June 2018, this item is only reported by banks that file a FFIEC Call Report 31and have total trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year. In 2017 this item is only reported by banks with average trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year (RC-K, item 7). Available starting in 2001. This item is only required to be filed banks that reported average trading assets (in the FFIEC Call Report Schedule RC-K, item 7) of $2 million or more for any quarter of the preceding calendar year. This item is not reported by for institutions filing a FFIEC Call Report 51 or a TFR Report.

name: IGLCMEXQ
label: Commodity and Other Exposures
definition: ( Qtly, $ ) Trading revenues on commodity and other exposures such as cash instruments and off-balance sheet derivative instruments. beginning in June 2018, this item is only reported by banks that file a FFIEC Call Report 31and have total trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year. In 2017 this item is only reported by banks with average trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year (RC-K, item 7). Available starting in 2001. This item is only required to be filed banks that reported average trading assets (in the FFIEC Call Report Schedule RC-K, item 7) of $2 million or more for any quarter of the preceding calendar year. This item is not reported by for institutions filing a FFIEC Call Report 51 or a TFR Report.

name: IGLCMEXQR
label: Commodity and Other Exposures
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Trading revenues on commodity and other exposures such as cash instruments and off-balance sheet derivative instruments. beginning in June 2018, this item is only reported by banks that file a FFIEC Call Report 31and have total trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year. In 2017 this item is only reported by banks with average trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year (RC-K, item 7). Available starting in 2001. This item is only required to be filed banks that reported average trading assets (in the FFIEC Call Report Schedule RC-K, item 7) of $2 million or more for any quarter of the preceding calendar year. This item is not reported by for institutions filing a FFIEC Call Report 51 or a TFR Report.

name: IGLCMEXR
label: Commodity and Other Exposures
definition: ( YTD, % ) Trading revenues on commodity and other exposures such as cash instruments and off-balance sheet derivative instruments. beginning in June 2018, this item is only reported by banks that file a FFIEC Call Report 31and have total trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year. In 2017 this item is only reported by banks with average trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year (RC-K, item 7). Available starting in 2001. This item is only required to be filed banks that reported average trading assets (in the FFIEC Call Report Schedule RC-K, item 7) of $2 million or more for any quarter of the preceding calendar year. This item is not reported by for institutions filing a FFIEC Call Report 51 or a TFR Report.

name: IGLCREX
label: Credit Exposures
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Trading revenues on credit exposures (from cash instruments and derivative instruments) beginning in June 2018, this item is only reported by banks that file a FFIEC Call Report 31and have total trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year. In 2017 this item is only reported by banks with average trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year (RC-K, item 7). Available starting in 2001. This item is only required to be filed banks that reported average trading assets (in the FFIEC Call Report Schedule RC-K, item 7) of $2 million or more for any quarter of the preceding calendar year. This item is not reported by for institutions filing a FFIEC Call Report 51 or a TFR Report.

name: IGLCREXQ
label: Credit Exposures
definition: ( Qtly, $ ) Trading revenues on credit exposures (from cash instruments and derivative instruments) beginning in June 2018, this item is only reported by banks that file a FFIEC Call Report 31and have total trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year. In 2017 this item is only reported by banks with average trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year (RC-K, item 7). Available starting in 2001. This item is only required to be filed banks that reported average trading assets (in the FFIEC Call Report Schedule RC-K, item 7) of $2 million or more for any quarter of the preceding calendar year. This item is not reported by for institutions filing a FFIEC Call Report 51 or a TFR Report.

name: IGLCREXQR
label: Credit Exposures
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Trading revenues on credit exposures (from cash instruments and derivative instruments) beginning in June 2018, this item is only reported by banks that file a FFIEC Call Report 31and have total trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year. In 2017 this item is only reported by banks with average trading assets of $10 million or more for any quarter of the previous year (RC-K, item 7). Available starting in 2001. This item is only required to be filed banks that reported average trading assets (in the FFIEC Call Report Schedule RC-K, item 7) of $2 million or more for any quarter of the preceding calendar year. This item is not reported by for institutions filing a FFIEC Call Report 51 or a TFR Report.

name: IGLCREXR
label: Credit Exposures

name: IINSOTH
label: Other Insurance Commissions and Fees
definition: ( YTD, $ ) This item is available beginning in March 2003. income from insurance product sales and referrals, including: (1) Service charges, commissions, and fees earned from insurance sales, including credit, life, health, property, casualty, and title insurance products as well as annuities (fixed, variable, and deferred). (2) Fees earned from customer referrals for insurance products and annuities to insurance companies and insurance agencies external to the consolidated bank. Also include management fees earned from separate accounts, deferred annuities, and universal life products. However, this item excludes commissions and fees from sales of annuities by the bank's trust department (or by a consolidated trust company subsidiary) that are executed in a fiduciary capacity. Also excluded are commissions and fees that the bank earns from the sale of annuities to bank customers by the bank’s securities brokerage subsidiary (See -'Investment banking, advisory, brokerage, and underwriting fees and commissions'). This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: IINSUND
label: Insurance Underwriting Income
definition: ( YTD, $ ) This item is available beginning in March 2003. the amount of premiums earned by bank subsidiaries engaged in insurance underwriting or reinsurance activities. Included are earned premiums from (a) life and health insurance and (b) property and casualty insurance, whether (direct) underwritten business or ceded or assumed (reinsured) business. Insurance premiums are reported net of any premiums transferred to other insurance underwriters/reinsurers in conjunction with reinsurance contracts. It also includes the bank's proportionate share of the income or loss before extraordinary items and other adjustments from its investments in equity method investees that are principally engaged in insurance underwriting or reinsurance activities. Equity method investees include unconsolidated subsidiaries; associated companies; and corporate joint ventures, unincorporated joint ventures, general partnerships, and limited partnerships over which the bank exercises significant influence. Income from insurance product sales and referrals is excluded (see - Other insurance income and fees). Not available for TFR Reporters.

name: INACTIVE
label: Inactive
definition: Institutions that are currently closed but were once insured by the FDIC.

name: INOFFICEACQUIRED
label: Date Office Acquired
definition: The date on which the branch was acquired by the current institution. If the branch was not previously owned, the date is blank.

name: INSAGENT1
label: Insurance Fund Membership
definition: Deposit Insurance Fund (DIF), Bank Insurance Fund (BIF), Savings Association Insurance Fund (SAIF)

name: INSAGENT2
label: Secondary Insurance Fund
definition: As a result of the establishment of a single Deposit Insurance Fund (DIF) effective April 1, 2006, the Secondary Insurance fund is no longer applicable. Before April 1, 2006, Bank Insurance Fund (BIF) or Savings Association Insurance Fund (SAIF)

name: INSAGNT1
label: INSAGNT1
definition:
The primary insurer, insurance agent, or insurance status of an institution
BIF        = BANK INSURANCE FUND
DIF        = DEPOSIT INSURANCE FUND
SAIF      = SAVINGS INSURANCE FUND
STATE   = STATE INSURED
PRIV      = PRIVATE INSURED
SOVER  = FOREIGN INSURED
OTHER  = OTHER INSURED
NONE    = NOT INSURED
NCUA    = NATIONAL CREDIT UNION ASSOCIATION INSURANCE

name: INSAGNT2
label: Secondary Insurance Fund
definition: As a result of the establishment of a single Deposit Insurance Fund (DIF) effective April 1, 2006, the Secondary Insurance fund is no longer applicable. previously both bif and saif bank insurance fund - institutions that are members of the bank insurance fund savings association insurance fund - Institutions that are members of the Savings Association Insurance Fund

name: INSBIF
label: Bank Insurance Fund
definition: Institutions who are members of the Bank Insurance Fund. As of April 1, 2006 BIF was merged together with the Savings Institution Insurance Fund (SAIF) to create a single Deposit Insurance Fund (DIF). All FDIC insured BIF member institutions, that are still active or open, are now insured members of DIF.

name: INSBRDD
label: INSBRDD
definition: Demand deposits in insured branches located in Puerto Rico and U.S. Territories and Possessions.

name: INSBRTS
label: INSBRTS
definition: Time and savings deposits in insured branches located in Puerto Rico and U.S. Territories and Possessions.

name: INSCOML
label: Insured commercial banks
definition: Includes commercial banks insured by the FDIC. These institutions are regulated by one of the three Federal commercial bank regulators (FDIC, Federal Reserve Board, or Office of the Comptroller of the Currency). They submit financial reports to the Federal Reserve (state member banks) or the FDIC (state non-member banks and national banks).

name: INSDATE
label: Date of Deposit Insurance
definition: The date that an institution obtained federal deposit insurance.

name: INSDIF
label: Deposit Insurance Fund member
definition: A flag used to indicate whether an institution is insured under the Deposit Insurance Fund (DIF). As of April 1, 2006 the Bank Insurance Fund (BIF) was merged together with the Savings Institution Insurance Fund (SAIF) to create a single Deposit Insurance Fund (DIF). All FDIC insured BIF and SAIF member institutions that are still active or open are now insured members of DIF. 0 = No, not DIF insured and 1 = Yes, DIF insured. Note that institutions that became inactive prior to April 1006 will also have zero value.

name: INSDROPDATE
label: Date of Dropped Deposit Insurance
definition: The date that an institution relinquished federal deposit insurance.

name: INSDROPDATE_RAW
label: Date of Dropped Deposit Insurance
definition: The date that an institution relinquished federal deposit insurance.

name: INSFDIC
label: FDIC Insured
definition: Includes institutions insured by the FDIC.

name: INSSAIF
label: SAIF Insured
definition: Institutions who are members of the Savings Association Insurance Fund. As of April 1, 2006 SAIF was merged together with the Bank Insurance Fund (BIF) to create a single Deposit Insurance Fund (DIF). All FDIC insured SAIF member institutions, that are still active or open, are now insured members of DIF.

name: INSSAVE
label: Insured Savings Institution
definition: Includes savings institutions insured by the FDIC that operate under state or federal banking codes applicable to thrift institutions. These institutions are regulated by and submit financial reports to one of two Federal regulators (FDIC or Office of Thrift Supervision).

name: INSTAG
label: Agricultural lending institution indicator
definition: An indicator specifying whether an institution is primarily an agricultural lending institution.

name: INSTCNT
label: Number of Institutions Reporting
definition: ( YTD, % ) The number of institutions represented in that column of data. This number is used primarily for peer group data.
