definition: ( Qtly, % ) If any, tenth additional web site (URL) that the bank uses to accept or ask for deposits from the public. Reported on the FFIEC Call Report, Schedule RC-M. The use of trade names and other websites is an optional business practice, not used by all banks.

name: TE01N528
label: Web Site URL 01
definition:
URLs of other public-facing Internet Web sites that the institution uses to accept or solicit deposits from the public, if any. if the reporting institution: (1) uses one or more trade names (other than its legal title) to accept or solicit deposits from the public, and directly or indirectly operates one or more public-facing Internet Web sites – other than its primary Internet Web site (home page). (2) Uses any other public-facing Internet Web sites prominently displaying the institution’s legal title – other than its primary Internet Web site (home page) – to accept or solicit deposits from the public. _x000D_
_x000D_
If applicable, additional website (URL) that the bank uses to accept or ask for deposits from the public. The use of trade names and other websites is an optional business practice, not used by all banks. As reported quarterly on the FFIEC Call Report, Schedule RC-M (This is item TE01N528). The information begins in March 2014 and is provided electronically by the bank to the FDIC. The information is not edited by the FDIC._x000D_
_x000D_
For more information regarding a trade name and/or URL for a particular bank, call the FDIC at 1-877-275-3342 and ask to speak with a deposit insurance specialist. If you do not see the Trade Name and/or URL that you are looking for, please call the FDIC.

name: TFRRPT
label: TFR Reporters
definition: On July 21, 2011, in accordance with the Dodd-Frank Act, the responsibility for regulating federal savings associations moved from the Office of Thrift Supervision (OTS) to the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC). Also as a result of Dodd-Frank legislation, all Insured institutions are required to file a Call Report as of the March 2012 reporting cycle. Insured savings institutions that were supervised by the office of thrift supervision (ots) and the office of the comptroller of the currency (occ) filed a thrift financial report (TFR). TFRs are quarterly reports of condition and income and were filed with the ots, or later the occ, as of the close of business on the last calendar day of each calendar quarter. Several reporting requirements were different from those of the FFIEC Call Reports. For further information on Thrift Financial Reports, click here. For further information on Call Reports, click here.

name: TRADENAMES_MORE
label: Help Text for Other Names and Websites Tab
definition: Other Names and Websites  The use of other names and additional websites is an optional business practice, not used by all banks.  When one bank purchases another bank, the name recognition and reputation of the bank being purchased may be very well known and established in its market area. Rather than change the name of this bank, the bank making the purchase will continue to use the acquired bank's original name as a trade name, to benefit from its good name and reputation.  In addition to having physical branches to accept deposits, many banks have established online deposit accepting websites (also known as URLs or Uniform Resource Locators ). Some of these websites will be named similarly to the name of the bank, such as, the website for a bank named ABC Bank being named www.abcbank.com. However, some banks will also have websites that have names that are not connected to the actual name of the bank. Please note that this information is provided electronically by the bank to the FDIC on the required FFIEC Call Reports. The information is not edited by the FDIC. If the information is not required to be reported on a quarterly basis, information reported in June and December may be carried forward to the next quarter.  For more information regarding a trade name and/or URL for a particular bank, call the FDIC at 1-877-275-3342 and ask to speak with a deposit insurance specialist. If you do not see the Trade Name and/or URL that you are looking for, please call the FDIC.

name: TRADENAMES_M_OVER
label: Other Names (Or Trade Names)
definition: Names, other than the bank’s legal name, used to identify one or more of its offices where deposits are accepted or requested, if any. Also known as “Trade Names. Please note that this information is provided electronically by the bank to the FDIC on the required FFIEC Call Reports. The information is not edited by the FDIC. If the information is not required to be reported on a quarterly basis, information reported in June and December may be carried forward to the next quarter.

name: TRADER
label: Assets Held in Trading Accounts
definition: ( YTD, % ) Securities and other assets acquired with the intent to resell in order to profit from short-term price movements. Effective January 1, 1994, this item includes revaluation gains. This item is included in securities for TFR Reporters.

name: TRANSNUM
label: System Transaction Number
definition: A unique number identifying the change/event of an institution.

name: TREXER
label: Number with Fiduciary power exercised
definition: Institution or trust company subsidiary of the institution exercises fiduciary powers granted by a state or national regulatory authority to administer accounts in a fiduciary capacity. Fiduciary capacity generally means: trustee, executor, administrator, registrar of stocks and bonds, transfer agent, guardian, assignee, receiver, custodian under a uniform gifts to minors act, investment advisor, any capacity in which the institution possesses investment discretion on behalf of another, or any similar capacity. Note: ;Domestic offices of foreign banks (a.k.a. IBA’s -- as defined by the International Banking Act) report annually, as of December.; All institutions that have any fiduciary or related assets file this information annually each December. However, Quarterly data is ONLY available for institutions that have total fiduciary assets greater than $250 million AND gross fiduciary and related service income greater than 10% of the revenue from the preceding calendar year.;

label: Transaction Accounts: Individuals, Partnerships and Corporations
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total transaction accounts of Individuals, partnerships and corporations (other than depository institutions) held in domestic offices. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR Reports ended in December 2011. with assets less than $300 million and risk-based capital ratios in excess of 12 percent.

name: TRNIPCOC
label: Transaction Accounts: Individuals, Partnerships and Corporations, including Checks
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Transaction deposits of Individuals, partnerships and corporations including certified and official checks held in domestic offices. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: TRNIPCOCR
label: Transaction Accounts: Individuals, Partnerships and Corporations, including Checks
definition: ( YTD, % ) Transaction deposits of Individuals, partnerships and corporations including certified and official checks held in domestic offices. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: TRNMUNI
label: Transaction Accounts: States and Political Subdivisions in U.S.
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Total transaction accounts of states, counties, municipalities, and local housing authorities (or political subdivisions) held in domestic offices. Included are deposits of funds advanced to states and political subdivisions by the U.S. government and corporations, and deposits of withheld income taxes of states and political subdivisions.

name: TRNMUNIR
label: Transaction Accounts: States and Political Subdivisions in U.S.
definition: ( YTD, % ) Total transaction accounts of states, counties, municipalities, and local housing authorities (or political subdivisions) held in domestic offices. Included are deposits of funds advanced to states and political subdivisions by the U.S. government and corporations, and deposits of withheld income taxes of states and political subdivisions.

name: TRNNIA
label: Amount of Noninterest-Bearing Transaction Deposit Accounts Over $250,000
definition: ( YTD, $ ) The amount of noninterest-bearing transaction deposit accounts (according to section 343 of the Dodd-Frank act) of more than $250,000 held in domestic offices and in Insured branches in US territories & possessions at the end of the reporting period. This item is available December 2010 through December 2013.

name: TRNNIAR
label: Amount of Noninterest-Bearing Transaction Deposit Accounts Over $250,000
definition: ( YTD, % ) The amount of noninterest-bearing transaction deposit accounts (according to section 343 of the Dodd-Frank act) of more than $250,000 held in domestic offices and in Insured branches in US territories & possessions at the end of the reporting period. This item is available December 2010 through December 2013.

name: TRNNIN
label: Number of Noninterest-Bearing Transaction Deposit Accounts Over $250,000
definition: ( YTD, $ and % ) The number of noninterest-bearing transaction accounts (according to section 343 of the Dodd-Frank act) of more than $250,000 held in domestic offices and in Insured branches in US territories & possessions at the end of the reporting period. This item is available as of December 2010 through December 2013.

name: TRNNOW
label: Transaction Accounts: Now Accounts
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Negotiable-order-of-withdrawal accounts included in transaction accounts held in domestic offices. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: TRNR
label: Domestic transaction accounts
definition: ( YTD, % ) The sum of the following accounts held in domestic offices: demand deposits, NOW accounts, Automated Transfer Service (ATS) accounts and telephone or preauthorized transfer accounts. prior to 2004, This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR reports ended December 2011.

name: TRNUSDEP
label: Transaction Accounts: Other Depository Institutions in U.S.
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Total transaction accounts of other depository institutions in the U.S., other than commercial banks, held in domestic offices.

name: TRNUSGOV
label: Transaction Accounts: U.S. Government
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Total transaction accounts of federal public funds made by or for the account of the U.S. government which are held in domestic offices.

name: TRNUSGOVR
label: Transaction Accounts: U.S. Government
definition: ( YTD, % ) Total transaction accounts of federal public funds made by or for the account of the U.S. government which are held in domestic offices.

name: TRPOWER
label: Number with fiduciary powers granted
definition: Institution has been granted trust powers by a state or national regulatory authority to administer accounts in a fiduciary capacity. Fiduciary capacity generally means: trustee, executor, administrator, registrar of stocks and bonds, transfer agent, guardian, assignee, receiver, custodian under a uniform gifts to minors act, investment advisor, any capacity in which the institution possesses investment discretion on behalf of another, or any similar capacity. Note: ;Domestic offices of foreign banks (a.k.a. IBA’s -- as defined by the International Banking Act) report annually, as of December.; ;All institutions that have any fiduciary or related assets file this information annually each December. However, Quarterly data is ONLY available for institutions that have total fiduciary assets greater than $250 million AND gross fiduciary and related service income greater than 10% of the revenue from the preceding calendar year.;

name: TRREVALSUM
label: Revaluation Gains on Off-Balance Sheet Contracts
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Revaluation Gains on Off-Balance Sheet Contracts

name: TRREVALSUMR
label: Revaluation Gains on Off-Balance Sheet Contracts
definition: ( YTD, % ) Revaluation Gains on Off-Balance Sheet Contracts

name: TRTMAGL
label: Employee Benefit and Retirement-Related Losses for Managed Accounts
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Aggregate Gross Settlements, Surcharges And Other Losses Arising From Errors, Misfeasance, Or Malfeasance On Managed Accounts - Employee Benefit And Retirement Related Trust And Agency Accounts     Reported In December Only By Institutions With Greater Than $100 Million In Total Fiduciary Assets Or Institutions With Gross Fiduciary And Related Services Income Greater Than 10% Of Revenue    Note: 1) Reported As A Memoranda Item in December 2) Prior To 2009, This Information Is Considered Confidential At The Institution Level By The FFIEC.

name: TRTNMGL
label: Employee Benefit and Retirement-Related Trust and Agency Accounts, Gross Losses on Non-Managed Accounts
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Aggregate Gross Settlements, Surcharges And Other Losses Arising From Errors, Misfeasance, Or Malfeasance On Non-Managed Accounts - Employee Benefit And Retirement Related Trust And Agency Accounts reported in December only by institutions with greater than $100 million in total fiduciary assets or institutions with gross fiduciary and related services income greater than 10% of revenue Note: 1) Reported As A Memoranda Item in December 2) Prior To 2009, This Information Is Considered Confidential At The Institution Level By The FFIEC.

name: TRTREC
label: Employee Benefit and Retirement-Related Trust and Agency Accounts, Recoveries
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Recoveries From Gross Settlements, Surcharges And Other Losses Arising From Errors, Misfeasance, Or Malfeasance On Managed Accounts And/Or Non-Managed Accounts - Employee Benefit And Retirement Related Trust And Agency Accounts    Reported In December Only By Institutions With Greater Than $100 Million In Total Fiduciary Assets Or Institutions With Gross Fiduciary And Related Services Income Greater Than 10% Of Revenue    NOTE: 1) Reported As A Memoranda Item 2) Prior To 2009, This Information Is Considered Confidential At The Institution Level By The FFIEC.

name: TRUST
label: Trust Powers

name: TS
label: Total Time and Savings Deposits
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Total transaction and nontransaction time and savings deposit accounts held in domestic offices. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR Reports ended in December 2011. with assets less than $300 million and risk-based capital ratios in excess of 12 percent.

name: TSR
label: Total Time and Savings Deposits
definition: ( YTD, % ) Total transaction and nontransaction time and savings deposit accounts held in domestic offices. This item is not available for TFR Reporters. TFR Reports ended in December 2011. with assets less than $300 million and risk-based capital ratios in excess of 12 percent.

name: TTL
label: Demand Notes Issued To U.S. Treasury
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Demand notes issued to the U.S. Treasury Department.

name: TTMA
label: Managed Assets ($)
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Total managed assets reported quarterly by institutions with total fiduciary assets greater than $250 million (prior December) or with fiduciary and related services income greater than 10% of revenue (net interest income plus noninterest income) for the prior calendar year.

name: TTNANUM
label: Number of Managed Accounts
definition: ( YTD, $ and % ) The total number of managed accounts. note: reported quarterly by institutions with total fiduciary assets of greater than $250 million (prior December) or with fiduciary and related services income of greater than 10% of revenue (net interest income plus noninterest income) for the prior calendar year. All others only report in December.

name: TTNMA
label: Non-Managed Assets ($)
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Total non-managed reported quarterly by institutions with total fiduciary assets greater than $250 million (prior December) or with fiduciary and related services income greater than 10% of revenue (net interest income plus Non-Interest income) for the prior calendar year.

name: TTNMNUM
label: Number of Non-Managed Accounts
definition: ( YTD, $ and % ) The total number of non-managed accounts reported quarterly by institutions with total fiduciary assets greater than $250 million (prior December) or with fiduciary and related services income greater than 10% of revenue (net interest income plus noninterest income) for the prior calendar year.

name: TTOTMAGL
label: Memo: Gross Losses for Managed Accounts (Dec. only)
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Aggregate Gross Settlements, Surcharges And Other Losses Arising From Errors, Misfeasance, Or Malfeasance On Managed Accounts - Total Fiduciary Settlements, Surcharges, And Other Losses   Reported In December Only By Institutions With Greater Than $100 Million In Total Fiduciary Assets Or Institutions With Gross Fiduciary And Related Services Income Greater Than 10% Of Revenue    Note: 1) Reported As A Memoranda Item in December only. 2) Prior To 2009, This Information Is Considered Confidential At The Institution Level By The FFIEC.

name: TTOTNMGL
label: Memoranda: Losses for Non-Managed Accounts (Dec. Only)
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Aggregate Gross Settlements, Surcharges And Other Losses Arising From Errors, Misfeasance, Or Malfeasance On Non-Managed Accounts - Total     Reported In December Only By Institutions With Greater Than $100 Million In Total Fiduciary Assets Or Institutions With Gross Fiduciary And Related Services Income Greater Than 10% Of Revenue    Note: 1) Reported As A Memoranda Item in December 2) Prior To 2009, This Information Is Considered Confidential At The Institution Level By The FFIEC.

name: TTOTREC
label: Memoranda: Recoveries for Fiduciary and Related Services Income (Dec. only)
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Recoveries From Gross Settlements, Surcharges And Other Losses Arising From Errors, Misfeasance, Or Malfeasance On Managed Accounts And/Or Non-Managed Accounts -Total    Reported In December Only By Institutions With Greater Than $100 Million In Total Fiduciary Assets Or Institutions With Gross Fiduciary And Related Services Income Greater Than 10% Of Revenue    Note: 1) Reported As A Memoranda Item 2) Prior To March 2009, This Information Is Considered Confidential At The Institution Level By The FFIEC.

name: UC
label: Total Unused Commitments
definition: ( YTD, $ ) The unused portions of commitments to make or purchase extensions of credit in the form of loans or participations in loans, lease financing receivables, or similar transactions for which a fee has been paid or are otherwise legally bound.

name: UCCOMRE
label: Unused Commitments: Commercial Real Estate, Construction & Land Development
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Unused portions of commitments to extend credit for commercial real estate, construction, and land development activities (includes commitments secured and unsecured by real estate).

name: UCCOMRER
label: Unused Commitments: Commercial Real Estate, Construction & Land Development
definition: ( YTD, % ) Unused portions of commitments to extend credit for commercial real estate, construction, and land development activities (includes commitments secured and unsecured by real estate).

name: UCCOMRES
label: Unused Commitments Secured By Real Estate
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Unused portions of commitments to extend credit to finance commercial and multifamily residential properties and land development.

name: UCCOMRESR
label: Unused Commitments Secured By Real Estate
definition: ( YTD, % ) Unused portions of commitments to extend credit to finance commercial and multifamily residential properties and land development.

name: UCCOMREU
label: Unused Commitments Not Secured By Real Estate
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Unused portions of commitments to extend credit to finance commercial and residential real estate activities reported as commercial and industrial loans or other loans .

name: UCCOMREUR
label: Unused Commitments Not Secured By Real Estate
definition: ( YTD, % ) Unused portions of commitments to extend credit to finance commercial and residential real estate activities reported as commercial and industrial loans or other loans .

name: UCCRCD
label: Unused Commitments Credit Card Lines
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Unused portions of commitments to extend credit both to Individuals for household, family, and other personal expenditures and to commercial or industrial enterprises through credit cards.

name: UCCRCDR
label: Unused Commitments Credit Card Lines
definition: ( YTD, % ) Unused portions of commitments to extend credit both to Individuals for household, family, and other personal expenditures and to commercial or industrial enterprises through credit cards.

name: UCLN
label: Unused Loan Commitments
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Unused commitments to make or purchase loans along with those to extend credit for lease financing arrangements. The amount reflects only the unused portion of the commitments that are legally bound through a fee or other method.  Includes unused credit card lines and home equity lines, unused commitments to make loans for commercial real estate construction and land development, unused commitments for commercial and industrial loans, unused commitments for loans to financial institutions, and unused other loan commitments.

name: UCLOC
label: Loan Commitments-Revolving, Open-End Lines Secured By 1-4'S
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Unused commitments for revolving, open-end lines secured by 1-4 family residential properties.

name: UCLOCR
label: Loan Commitments-Revolving, Open-End Lines Secured By 1-4'S
definition: ( YTD, % ) Unused commitments for revolving, open-end lines secured by 1-4 family residential properties.

name: UCOTHER
label: Other Unused Commitments
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Unused portion of commitments for purposes other than revolving, open-end lines secured by 1-4 family residential property, credit card lines, commercial real estate, construction and land development, and securities underwriting. This includes commitments to extend credit through overdraft facilities or commercial lines of credit and retail check, credit, and related plans.

name: UCOTHERR
label: Other Unused Commitments
definition: ( YTD, % ) Unused portion of commitments for purposes other than revolving, open-end lines secured by 1-4 family residential property, credit card lines, commercial real estate, construction and land development, and securities underwriting. This includes commitments to extend credit through overdraft facilities or commercial lines of credit and retail check, credit, and related plans.

name: UCOVER1
label: Commitments With An Original Maturity Exceeding 1 Yr.
definition: ( YTD, $ ) All unused commitments that obligate the bank to extend credit in the form of loans or participations in loans, lease financing receivables or similar transactions and have an original maturity date exceeding one year. This item reflects only the unused portion (gross amount) of commitments that a fee has been paid or otherwise legally binding. Banks having assets less than $100 million do not report this item.     Included off-balance sheet securitization exposures before March 2015.

name: UCOVER1K
label: Participations in Commitments With An Original Maturity Exceeding 1 Year
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Unused portion of commitments to extend credit with an original maturity date exceeding one year where the participation is conveyed to others. This item reflects only the unused portion (gross amount) of commitments that a fee has been paid or otherwise legally binding. Banks having assets less than $100 million do not report this item.

name: UCOVER1R
label: Commitments With An Original Maturity Exceeding 1 Yr.
definition: ( YTD, % ) All unused commitments that obligate the bank to extend credit in the form of loans or participations in loans, lease financing receivables or similar transactions and have an original maturity date exceeding one year. This item reflects only the unused portion (gross amount) of commitments that a fee has been paid or otherwise legally binding. Banks having assets less than $100 million do not report this item.     Included off-balance sheet securitization exposures before March 2015.

name: UCR
label: Total Unused Commitments
definition: ( YTD, % ) The unused portions of commitments to make or purchase extensions of credit in the form of loans or participations in loans, lease financing receivables, or similar transactions for which a fee has been paid or are otherwise legally bound.

name: UCSC
label: Securities Underwriting
definition: ( YTD, $ ) The unsold portions of the reporting bank's takedown in securities underwriting transactions. This includes revolving underwriting facilities (RUF), note issuance facilities (NIF) and other similar arrangements.

name: UCSCR
label: Securities Underwriting
definition: ( YTD, % ) The unsold portions of the reporting bank's takedown in securities underwriting transactions. This includes revolving underwriting facilities (RUF), note issuance facilities (NIF) and other similar arrangements.

name: UCSZAUTO
label: Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments, Liquidity Auto Loans
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Auto Loans Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments To Provide Liquidity To Other Institutions Securitization Structures On Auto Loans.

name: UCSZCI
label: Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments, Liquidity C&I Loans
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Commercial & Industrial Loans Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments To Provide Liquidity To Other Institutions Securitization Structures On Commercial And Industrial Loans.

name: UCSZCON
label: Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments, Liquidity Other Consumer Loans
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Other Consumer Loans Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments To Provide Liquidity To Other Institutions Securitization Structures On Other Consumer Loans.

name: UCSZCRCD
label: Reporting Bank's Unused Commits, Liquidity Credit Cards Receivables Before June 18
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Credit Cards Receivables Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments To Provide Liquidity To Other Institutions Securitization Structures On Credit Card Receivables.  This line item ends March 2018, institutions now report any of these in All Other Loans and All Leases.

name: UCSZHEL
label: Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments Home Equity Lines Before June 2018
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Home Equity Lines Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments To Provide Liquidity To Other Institutions Securitization Structures On Home Equity Lines.  This line item ends March 2018, institutions now report any of these in All Other Loans and All Leases.

name: UCSZOTH
label: Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments, Liquidity All Other Lns. & All Ls.
definition: ( Qtly, % ) All Other Loans and All Leases Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments To Provide Liquidity To Other Institutions Securitization Structures On All Other Loans, Other Assets and Leases.

name: UCSZRES
label: Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments 1-4 Family Residential Loans
definition: ( Qtly, % ) 1-4 Family Residential Loans Reporting Bank's Unused Commitments To Provide Liquidity To Other Institutions Securitization Structures On 1-4 Family Residential Loans.

name: ULTCERT
label: Ultimate Cert
definition: ( Qtly, % ) The FDIC certificate number of the most recent successor institution, or acquirer of the institution, for merged institutions.

name: UNINC
label: Less: Unearned Income
definition: ( Qtly, % ) Unearned income on loans.

name: UNINCFOR
label: Plus Unearned Income
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Unearned income on loans held in foreign offices.

name: UNINCFORR
label: Plus Unearned Income
definition: ( YTD, % ) Unearned income on loans held in foreign offices.

name: UNINUM
label: FDIC's unique number
definition: A unique number for the bank or savings institution assigned by the FDIC in order to identify and track. The UNINUM for the Headquarters branch is the same as the UNINUM for the entire bank or savings institution.

name: UNINUMBR
label: UNINUMBR
definition: The unique number associated with a specific physical location of a branch.  This number remains with this location over time, regardless of ownership.

name: UNIT
label: UNIT
definition: A flag that identifies an institution with only a main office location; no branch locations.

name: USA
label: USA
definition: A flag that identifies that the institution is headquartered in the United States.

name: VOLIAB
label: Volatile Liabilities
definition: ( YTD, $ ) Volatile liabilities on a consolidated basis includes:  (1) Federal funds purchased and securities sold under agreements to repurchase,  (2) Demand notes issued to the US Treasury and other borrowed money with remaining maturity of 1 year or less, including FHLB advances (beginning March 1997 includes mortgage indebtedness and obligations under capitalized leases),  (3) Time deposits over $250,000 held in domestic offices (prior to March 2010, includes time deposits of $100,000 or more in domestic offices)  (4) Foreign office deposits  (5) Trading liabilities less trading liabilities revaluation losses on interest rate, foreign exchange rate, and other commodity and equity contracts. Note:  The volatile liabilities definition was changed in March 2011 to incorporate the change in time deposits to include deposits over $250,000 as of the March 2010 reporting period. Prior to the March 2010 reporting period, this item included deposits of $100,000 or more.

name: VOLIABR
label: Volatile Liabilities
definition: ( YTD, % ) Volatile liabilities on a consolidated basis includes:  (1) Federal funds purchased and securities sold under agreements to repurchase,  (2) Demand notes issued to the US Treasury and other borrowed money with remaining maturity of 1 year or less, including FHLB advances (beginning March 1997 includes mortgage indebtedness and obligations under capitalized leases),  (3) Time deposits over $250,000 held in domestic offices (prior to March 2010, includes time deposits of $100,000 or more in domestic offices)  (4) Foreign office deposits  (5) Trading liabilities less trading liabilities revaluation losses on interest rate, foreign exchange rate, and other commodity and equity contracts. Note:  The volatile liabilities definition was changed in March 2011 to incorporate the change in time deposits to include deposits over $250,000 as of the March 2010 reporting period. Prior to the March 2010 reporting period, this item included deposits of $100,000 or more.

name: WEBADDR
label: Primary Internet Web Address
definition: The primary internet web address is the public internet site obtained from the most recent FFIEC Call Report (CALL) for commercial banks or from the supplemental information for Thrift Financial Reporters (TFR). The primary internet web address is included only for those institutions reporting an address on the most recent FFIEC Call Report or Thrift Financial Report.

name: YEAR
label: YEAR
definition: Year of survey (1994 - Current). All SOD surveys are annual as of June 30.

name: ZIP
label: Zip Code
definition: The first three, four, or five digits of the full postal zip code representing physical location of the institution or one of its branch offices.

name: ZIPBR
label: ZIPBR
definition: The ZIP code associated with the physical address of the branch.

name: ZIPREST
label: Zip Code Extension
definition: The 4-digit zip code extension of the physical location of an institution or one if its branch offices.

name: ZIP_RAW
label: 5-Digit Zip Code
definition: The postal code (e.g. ZIP Code for the U.S.) associated with the physical address of the institution's main office.
